catalogData.name: Temptation
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Mysterious Allure
powers.raw: Mysterious Allure (Trait): You gain +Force/2 on tests to seduce someone
powers.text: You gain +Force/2 on tests to seduce someone

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Change Appearance
powers.raw: Change Appearance (Complex Action): Cast Disguise on self at Force. Doesn't count towards limit of 1 sustained power.
powers.text: Cast Disguise on self at Force. Doesn't count towards limit of 1 sustained power.

powers.name: Entice
powers.raw: Entice (Complex Action): Cast Influence at Force, but must appeal to base desire.
powers.text: Cast Influence at Force, but must appeal to base desire.

powers.name: Pain is Pleasure
powers.raw: Pain is Pleasure (Major Action, Sustained): Target gains +Force/3 to Wounded Limit

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Special): Cast Inebriate or Phantasm at Force
powers.text: Cast Inebriate or Phantasm at Force

powers.name: Skill Guidance
powers.raw: Skill Guidance (Complex Action, Sustained): Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Influence if unaugmented skill ≤ Force
powers.text: Target gains +2 augmentation bonus to Influence if unaugmented skill ≤ Force

greatFormPowers.name: Waking Dream
greatFormPowers.raw: Waking Dream (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Phantasm at Force on (Force) targets
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Phantasm at Force on (Force) targets
